freecam.msg.restricted.server: Freecam is restricted on the current server (%s).
freecam.config.gui.fallback.title: Config GUI not available.
freecam.config.gui.title: Freecam Options
freecam.config.controls.label: Key Bindings
freecam.config.movement.label: Movement Options
freecam.config.movement.flightMode.label: Flight Mode
freecam.config.movement.flightMode.toolt: The type of flight used by freecam.
freecam.config.collision.label: Collision Options
freecam.config.collision.tooltip: Which blocks you can travel through in freecam.
freecam.config.collision.ignoreTranspare: Allows travelling through transparent blocks in freecam.
Allows travelling through doors/trapdoors/gates in freecam.
freecam.config.collision.ignoreCustom.to: Allows travelling through specific blocks in freecam.
freecam.config.collision.whitelist.ids.t: If the namespace is omitted, "minecraft:" is assumed.
freecam.config.collision.whitelist.patte: Matched against full block id, e.g. "minecraft:grass_block".
freecam.config.collision.ignoreAll.label: Ignore All Collision
freecam.config.collision.ignoreAll.toolt: Allows travelling through all blocks in freecam.
freecam.config.collision.alwaysCheck.too: collision, even when using §7Ignore All Collision§r.
freecam.config.visual.label: Visual Options
freecam.config.visual.perspective.label: Initial Perspective
freecam.config.visual.perspective.toolti: The initial perspective of the camera.
freecam.config.visual.showPlayer.label: Show Player
freecam.config.visual.showPlayer.tooltip: Shows your player in its original position.
freecam.config.visual.showHand.label: Show Hand
freecam.config.visual.showHand.tooltip: Whether you can see your hand in freecam.
freecam.config.visual.fullBright.label: Full Brightness
Whether you see a fog overlay underwater, in lava, or powdered snow.
freecam.config.utility.label: Utility Options
freecam.config.utility.disableOnDamage.t: Disables freecam when damage is received.
freecam.config.utility.freezePlayer.tool: Prevents player movement while freecam is active.
freecam.config.utility.interact.allow.to: Whether you can interact with blocks/entities in freecam.
freecam.config.servers.label: Multiplayer Options
freecam.config.servers.mode.label: Restriction mode
freecam.config.servers.mode.tooltip[0]: Allow or disallow use of freecam on certain servers.
freecam.config.servers.whitelist.label: Whitelist:
freecam.config.servers.blacklist.label: Blacklist:
freecam.config.notification.label: Notification Options
freecam.config.notification.tripod.label: Tripod Notifications
freecam.config.notification.tripod.toolt: Notifies you when entering/exiting tripod cameras.
